Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Nicholas A. Merrell,for plaintiff/moving party: CH2M Hill constructors, Inc.
Jeffrey A. Wilcox/Aaron Gruber, fof Deft./Opposing party Board of Trustee of Calif
State University.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff CH2M Hill Constructors Inc.'s Motion To Compel Defendant's Production Of Documents is granted in part, and denied in part.
As to the production of documents in their native format, Defendant is ordered to produce those documents within 15 days of notice of this order.
As to redacted documents, redactions of irrelevant materials is proper. As documents relate to projects on campuses other than the San Francisco campus, those materials are irrelevant. However, redactions must be identified with particularity.
As to documents containing sensitive financial documents, Defendant is ordered to produce those documents subject to a confidentiality order limiting access to the records and limiting their use to this litigation. There is no California Public Records Act privilege, and any documents withheld on that basis are ordered produced within 15 days of notice of this order.
The court will not determine the validity of the common interest doctrine as a basis for withholding any documents on this motion. That determination cannot be made without further briefing setting forth the basis for the claim and the reasons supporting and challenging the claim as to specific documents.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
